---
title: 'How do I accept mobile money?'
description: 'Use hosted checkout, payment links, or direct payment flows to accept Wave, MTN MoMo, Orange Money, SPI, and local payment methods.'
---

Mobile money is usually best handled through hosted checkout or payment links first. Those flows let lomi. present the right payment method and customer instructions for the selected market.

![Placeholder mobile money checkout](/placeholder.webp)

## Recommended paths

| Path | Use when |
| --- | --- |
| Hosted checkout | Your app creates the order and redirects the customer |
| Payment links | You want a shareable URL for invoices, services, or informal sales |
| Payment requests | Your backend creates a payment request for an app-controlled flow |
| Direct charge APIs | You need lower-level control and understand the provider-specific UX |

## What to design for

Mobile money flows can be asynchronous. Your customer may approve in an app, via USSD, or through provider-specific instructions. Always show a pending state and rely on webhooks or server-side reads for final state.
